title: Constant Contact vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Constant Contact vs Privy: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than Privy?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or Privy?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
